comments.text: Coach, we got exactly what we deserved today. Szoboszlai scored such a stunning goal, and we started the second half so stronglyвАФanyone could see we were dominating. But as soon as we took the lead, we reverted to that same old mistake: slowing the game down and trying to sit back. Why change what was working? Why stop the fast-paced attacking football that could have easily gotten us a second goal? We had them on the ropes, but instead, we invited pressure.
